game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Shadow Fight 2 Special Edition:** Players engage in 1v1 martial arts combat against AI opponents using a virtual D-pad on the left for movement (forward, backward, crouch, jump) and two virtual buttons on the right for punch and kick. Combining D-pad inputs with attack buttons executes a diverse arsenal of dozens of special moves and combos, each with specific damage and animation properties. Combat involves depleting the opponent's health bar across a best-of-three rounds format, with players earning coins and gems from victories to purchase and upgrade weapons, armor, and magic spells, which directly impact attack power, defense, and speed stats. The game features a linear story progression across 7 distinct provinces, with each province introducing progressively stronger enemy types and culminating in a challenging boss fight that gates further advancement. Difficulty scales as enemy AI becomes more aggressive and their stats increase, necessitating strategic gear upgrades and mastery of new combat techniques to complete the story and defeat Titan.
game_info.description: Shadow Fight Special Edition: Battle through 7 provinces in epic 1v1 martial arts combat. Defeat increasingly challenging enemies and bosses using punches, kicks, and special combo moves. Earn coins to upgrade your weapons, armor, and abilities. Master the combat system to survive tougher opponents and ultimately defeat the final boss Titan. Each round depletes your opponent's health bar in a best-of-three format. Strategic upgrades and skillful execution are key to victory.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Move backward / Block
Arrow Right: Move forward / Attack position
Arrow Up: Jump
Arrow Down: Crouch
Z: Punch / Execute combo moves
Space: Kick / Execute combo moves
Shift: Special ability (when unlocked)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat validation. Tests that the player can move, attack, and interact with enemies. Validates position changes, attack execution, and basic collision detection work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Execute a sequence of movements (forward, backward, jump) and attacks (punch, kick) to verify controls respond correctly. Approach enemy and land basic attacks to test damage system and collision.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions, attacks register hits on enemy, health bars update correctly, and no movement glitches occur. Test passes when player can consistently land attacks.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves in all directions, attacks register hits on enemy, health bars update correctly, and no movement glitches occur. Test passes when player can consistently land attacks.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. Implements aggressive combat tactics to defeat opponents efficiently and progress through provinces. Tests the complete game flow from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Maintain optimal distance from enemy, use combination of punches and kicks to build combos. Move forward aggressively when enemy is vulnerable, retreat when enemy attacks. Focus on depleting enemy health quickly while managing own health.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player wins rounds by reducing enemy health to zero, earns coins, potentially purchases upgrades, progresses through provinces, and eventually reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating all bosses.

TEST_3.test_description: Defensive and evasion mechanics test. Validates that blocking, dodging, and defensive movements work correctly to avoid damage.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use backward movement to create distance when enemy attacks. Test jump and crouch to evade attacks. Block enemy attacks by moving backward at the right time.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully avoids taking damage through movement and positioning. Health bar remains stable when defensive tactics are employed correctly.
TEST_3.description: Defensive and evasion mechanics test. Validates that blocking, dodging, and defensive movements work correctly to avoid damage.

TEST_4.test_description: Combo system validation. Tests special move execution by combining directional inputs with attack buttons to verify combo mechanics work.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Execute various input combinations: forward+punch, jump+kick, crouch+punch to trigger special moves. Verify each combo deals appropriate damage and plays correct animation.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Special moves execute when correct input combinations are pressed. Combos deal increased damage compared to basic attacks. Visual feedback shows distinct combo animations.
TEST_4.description: Combo system validation. Tests special move execution by combining directional inputs with attack buttons to verify combo mechanics work.

TEST_5.test_description: Upgrade and progression system test. Validates earning coins from victories and purchasing upgrades affects player stats correctly.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Win matches to earn coins. Between rounds, verify coin count increases. Test that damage output increases after simulated weapon upgrades.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Coins accumulate after victories. Player stats improve when upgrades are applied. Progression through provinces unlocks as enemies are defeated.
